title: upGrad Just Acquired Internshala
description:
upGrad just acquired 90% of Internshala in an almost entirely stock-swap deal.

Internshala brings:
• 34 million registered users
• 4.5 lakh employers
• 3 million active applicants annually
• 40%+ traffic from Tier 2 & Tier 3 cities

Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/
